query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, u.platform_role, cm.company_id, cm.role as member_role, cm.is_active, c.name as company_name
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN company_members cm ON cm.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN companies c ON c.id = cm.company_id
WHERE u.email = 'luxsess2001@gmail.com';
